IMethodVerb Interface

One Identity Manager API Server

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IMethodVerb : IMethod

The IMethodVerb type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
Description
Gets or sets a descriptive text for this operation. If this is null, use the method-level method description instead (Description).
EndpointSecurityIdentifiers
Returns the endpoint security identifiers which manage the permission to call this route verb. If this is null, this endpoint defines its own security identifier.
Route
Verb

Configures the method to allow creation of new delayed-logic entities.

Creates an API method that will read/write data from a database table, but the related table is not known at compile time.

GetCrudModel
Returns the existing CRUD model for the given method, or null if there is none.

Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input and returns no data.
